summary: Mixed opinions on the split‑track mix; some praise its authentic pacing while others dislike the banter and endless tuning between tracks.
review: Reviewers focus almost entirely on the recording format. One reviewer loves the great mix and the preservation of song-to-song pacing, while another is put off by the excessive banter and tuning gaps at the start of each track. No comments are made about the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only two reviews with contradictory views; recording quality is praised by one and criticized by the other, and there are no remarks on the show itself, leading to a modest overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: One reviewer calls the mix great but notes 'banter and endless tuning at beginning of each track' as brutal. Another appreciates the split‑track tracking for preserving live pacing, calling it awesome.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on performance; reviewers discuss only recording structure and pacing.
